title: Inthi Ninna Preethiya
desc: Rajeev becomes an alcoholic after he breaks up with his lover, Namana. His life takes a turn for the worse when his brother forcefully gets him married to another girl.

title: Max
desc: Inspector Arjun arrests two men for crashing into the police station. Soon, he desperately rushes to clear his name as the two are found dead.

title: Kaatera
desc: Kaatera, a blacksmith from a village named Bheemanahalli, goes through numerous threats so that a reforms act gets implemented which gives freedom to the farmers from feudal landlords.

title: Kantara: A Legend - Chapter 1
desc: In pre-colonial Karnataka, during the Kadamba dynasty era, the ritual of Bhuta Kola takes root in the culture. Meanwhile, the seeds for the rise of Kaadubettu Shiva are also sown.

title: Naanu Matthu Gunda 2
desc: A warm story unfolds between a lonely man and a loyal dog whose bond transforms their lives, bringing companionship, healing and emotional strength through life's struggles.

title: Preethse
desc: Surya, a military commander, is soon to be engaged to Kiran, a college student. Unbeknownst to him, one of Kiran's classmates is also in love with her.
